brief: Plan a dental practice homepage for new patients who need to understand the offer, trust the practice, and book an appointment. Include landmark coverage, a booking dialog overlay with a dismissal contract, and mobile responsive priority notes.

requiredSignals.description: Blueprint is typed as a wireframe artifact.
Root node is present for the page structure.
Hero section is present for the primary offer and orientation.
Navigation node is present for wayfinding.
At least one overlay is declared for the booking dialog.
Responsive priority block is present to guide mobile layout decisions.
Every declared overlay includes an accessibility block documenting keyboard and focus behavior.
No filler labels used in place of meaningful node content.
